description: Fix multiple game logic bugs: Marshal multi-select movement, Fujin confirmation step, Kotahi harvest ability, Betrayal flow improvements
steps: MARSHAL MULTI-SELECT FIX in src/utils/gameLogic.ts: The moveForces function rejects figureIds.length !== 1 during marshal. Fix this by making it process multiple figures in a loop - for each selected figure, validate and move it individually. Keep marshalMovedFigures tracking. The user selects multiple figures and clicks destination, all valid ones should move.

FUJIN CONFIRMATION STEP in src/store/gameStore.ts: In doFujinMove, when remaining <= 0 (all 2 moves used), do NOT auto-advance. Instead, keep the state as-is with fujinMovesRemaining=0, moveMode still true, and store the pre-move state. Show the same confirm/undo UI that exists. Add a check in the Fujin UI section (GameBoard.tsx around line 270-290) that when fujinMovesRemaining is 0 AND kamiResolutionActive is true AND the current temple is fujin, show only 'Confirmar' and 'Deshacer' buttons. The 'Confirmar' button calls doFujinDone(). The Undo button calls doFujinUndo().

KOTAHI HARVEST FIX in src/utils/gameLogic.ts: In the harvest mandate resolution (around line 996-1060), after computing rewards for harvesters, add a separate pass for Kotahi. For each province, check if any player has a monster with monsterCardId 'sp-kotahi' deployed there. If that player has the most force in that province (same force calculation as regular harvest) AND they are NOT already in harvesters list, grant them the province harvest reward too. Add their reward to harvestPlayerRewards array.

BETRAYAL FLOW IMPROVEMENTS in src/store/gameStore.ts and src/utils/gameLogic.ts: (A) In doBetraySelectFigure, when ns.betrayMandateActive is still true (more replacements remaining), do NOT set turnPopupPlayer. Remove the turnPopupPlayer setting from this branch. (B) When all replacements are done (betraySelectionsRemaining reaches 0 in gameLogic.ts), do NOT call finalizeBetray automatically. Instead, keep betrayMandateActive=true but set betraySelectionsRemaining=0. (C) In the store doBetraySelectFigure, when ns.betrayMandateActive is true but betraySelectionsRemaining is 0, just set the state without advancing. (D) Only when doSkipBetrayTurn is called (the 'Terminar' button), finalize and advance.
acceptance_criteria: Marshal movement works with multiple figures selected simultaneously
Fujin does NOT auto-advance after 2 moves - shows confirm/undo buttons instead
Kotahi owner gets harvest reward from their province if they have majority, regardless of who chose Harvest mandate
Betrayal does not show turn popup between replacements
Betrayal does not auto-advance after 2 replacements - waits for 'Terminar' button
findings: All 4 bugs fixed and TypeScript compilation passes. Marshal now processes multiple figures in a loop. Fujin no longer auto-advances after 2 moves (shows Confirmar/Deshacer buttons). Kotahi harvest pass added after main harvest loop. Betrayal flow no longer shows turnPopupPlayer between replacements and does not auto-finalize when selections reach 0.
